narrative:
Madison Township has 6,113 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.2 percentage points.
